headline: PPG IT team named ‘Tech Team of the Year’ by Pittsburgh Technology Council
summary: PITTSBURGH, April 30, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) today announced that its Information Technology (IT) team has received the ‘Tech Team of the Year’ award from the Pittsburgh Technology Council. PPG was selected among five finalists in recognition of its landmark cloud-only IT transformation.

headline: PPG Industries Inc (PPG) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Sales Growth Amidst Global ...
summary: PPG Industries Inc (PPG) reports a 7% increase in net sales and a 6% rise in adjusted EPS, showcasing resilience despite geopolitical and market pressures.
